hook.headline: This IG DM either gets a date… or blocked

reply.text: You look like the type of problem my future self will regret

messages.text: about that quick, you walked into 7 eleven dressed like inflation
and u walked in my dms acting brave
brave is grabbing hot cheetos knowing you already spicy
that line dusty like that freezer door 😂
door fogged up same way my brain did seeing you
u using that on every girl with chips
cute words, where is the proof
he said stop, current me said double it
u flirting or having a stroke
i've been watching your stuff for a while
tragic, go drink a redbull or something
i can back it up in person
bold assuming i got time friday
